name: Cathédrale des Voix
description: Structure vivante issue de gravats lévitant en forme de nef gothique inversée. Des bouches hurlantes couvrent chaque surface murmurant la Chanson Dissonante qui brise les psychés militaires.
prompt: Colossal levitating inverted gothic cathedral made of floating rubble and concrete, screaming mouths covering every surface, purple psychic energy emanating from windows, cosmic horror grimdark sci-fi, cinematic lighting, highly detailed
